Generate a specification for adding the following features to the Nuxt app in this repo:

- When the app opens, the app makes an API query to get a list of OpenAI models. The API is described here: https://developers.openai.com/api/reference/resources/models/methods/list
- After the query is made, a new section of the app's interface, just below the chatbox, displays the query results if the query succeeded, or else displays an error message "Error: Failed query to get list of OpenAI models"

Save the specification to .github/application-specifications-query-for-openai-models.md.
